domain_separation.health_optimisation: personal health intelligence and care coordination
domain_separation.psychology: mental-health/addiction care coordination and licensed-provider routing

requirements.requirement: Preserve exact source/project identity, pointer, extraction method and hash; separate raw evidence from normalized requirements.
Keep user facts, diagnostics, labels, assistant proposals, guidance, research, provider marketing and exploratory sources distinct.
Assign A/B/C/D/F/UNASSESSED grades and prevent weak/unassessed claims being represented as established care.
Reject guaranteed cure, inevitable remission, universal cure and zero-risk claims.
Prioritise emergency/crisis escalation over optimisation when urgent red flags are detected.
Require clinician review for diagnosis, prescription change, treatment selection or user-specific diagnostic interpretation.
Block autonomous medical-device control and unsupervised settings, including Spooky2/Rife/PEMF/tDCS/TMS/VNS/HBOT/laser/PBM.
Treat frequency/bioresonance/scalar/biofield material as exploratory only, never diagnosis, drug simulation or cure.
Block psychedelic, ibogaine, ketamine and controlled-substance dosing without lawful specialist-led care.
Block actionable CRISPR, DBS, optogenetics, stem-cell, exosome, young-plasma or invasive experimental protocols pending review.
Support privacy-safe lab/genetics/imaging/record import and clinician packets without autonomous final diagnosis.
Maintain medication, supplement, allergy, contraindication and interaction records with clinician/pharmacist review.
Coordinate evidence-led substance-use recovery, relapse and withdrawal safety.
Coordinate ADHD, OCD, trauma/PTSD, compulsive behaviour, motivation and addiction psychology with crisis/provider gates.
Coordinate TBI, cognition, memory and neurorehabilitation evidence without causal overclaim.
Coordinate oncology/lymphoma survivorship and immune/viral context with specialist care and surveillance.
Track metabolic, fatty-liver, weight and glucose factors using evidence-led monitoring and professional escalation.
Track sleep, fatigue, circadian, HRV and recovery with sleep-disorder/medical escalation.
Evidence-grade gut/microbiome/mould/parasite/heavy-metal/detox claims and block unsafe cleanse/chelation protocols.
Evidence-grade HBOT/PBM/PEMF/TMS/neurofeedback/tDCS/VNS by indication, device status, contraindication and supervision.
Maintain Melbourne/Australia-first provider directory with official current verification and AUD costs.
Provide privacy-safe goals, symptoms, tests, medicines, supplements, devices, appointments, interventions, outcomes and adverse-event dashboard.
Generate concise clinician packets with provenance, questions, contradictions, current lists, red flags and requested decisions.
Apply restricted-health classification, consent, least privilege, retention/deletion and separation from business/finance data.
Log source, grade, review, decision, outcome and correction; require versioning/safety/tests before promotion.
Track contradictions, check dates, expiry and corrections for medical/provider/product/legal/device claims.
Route through established care, adjunct evidence-led care, trials and experimental review rather than jumping to high-risk interventions.
Maintain device identity, regulatory status, intended use, contraindications, maintenance, calibration and operator competency.
Support consented wearable/symptom data with minimisation, quality checks, trend context and no autonomous diagnosis.
Extract supplement-label metadata without endorsement and require quality, dose, duplication, contraindication and interaction review.
Never present Jarvis, devices, supplements or alternative care as replacement for emergency, diagnosis or qualified treatment.
Use Melbourne dates, Australian services, applicable official sources and AUD costs when current local information is required.

truth_boundary: Normalized requirements with source lineage, not clinical recommendations. SPEC_LOCKED/BACKLOGGED items are not runtime capabilities.
